goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'rosa's bed and breakfast'.
Make sure you get 'price range' and 'star of the hotel'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.
